projects.name: sql-data-analysis-and-visualization-projects
projects.description: Collection of hands-on SQL data analysis and visualization projects — querying, transforming, and exploring datasets in Jupyter notebooks to surface trends and business insights.

projects.name: mutual-fund-analysis-dashboard-python-powerbi
projects.description: Interactive mutual fund analysis dashboard combining Python data processing with a Power BI front end for fund performance, allocation, and trend reporting.

projects.name: us-healthcare-analysis-powerbi
projects.description: Power BI analytics project exploring U.S. healthcare data — KPI dashboards and visual reporting on cost, utilization, and outcome metrics.

projects.name: nursing-home-financial-analysis
projects.description: Financial analysis project examining nursing home cost and revenue data to identify spending patterns and reporting insights.

projects.name: streamlit-eda-project
projects.description: Mini employee exploratory data analysis (EDA) app built with Streamlit for interactive data exploration and visualization.

projects.name: elk-siem-dashboard
projects.description: Security analytics dashboard built on the ELK stack — ingesting and visualizing log data for SIEM-style monitoring and anomaly detection.
